title: Clipping and Masking
description: Build decorative shapes using clip-path to create a hexagon, a star badge, and a custom polygon
html:
HEX
CLIP
GO

hints.text: clip-path defines a visible area. polygon() takes pairs of x,y percentages. circle() defines a circular clip region.
Hexagon uses 6 polygon points. Circle uses clip-path: circle(50%). Arrow uses a 7-point polygon that creates a right-pointing arrow shape.
Apply clip-path with polygon() for hexagon and arrow, circle() for the circle.
